Localization.Description: Hot swapping of virtual machine disks

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} unplugged disk "{object.value}" from running virtual machine "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to unplug disk "{object.value}" from running virtual machine "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} plugged disk "{object.value}" to running virtual machine "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to plug disk "{object.value}" to running virtual machine "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
